title: Barguna Moocha
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Barguna Moocha''' was an extremely successful chain of superstores that had locations throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It often purchased smaller, private enterprises to be absorbed into its organization. One example of this was the [[Bargoon Tatooni]] trading post in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which was bought out by the chain at some point after [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Barguna Moocha's penchant for muscling out smaller business is most likely a parallel to the [[Wikipedia:Wal-Mart|Wal-Mart]] corporation

==Sources==
